caption: A man with a tall, silver-grey wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bow tie and tan suspenders. Behind him is a wall covered in framed photographs and a white storage bin. A black microphone is positioned in front of him, and the logo "GOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" appears in the lower corners of the scene. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hands. In the beginning, he holds his right hand near his chest, then extends both hands forward in a conversational gesture, and finally returns to a more neutral posture with his hands down. The background remains static throughout the clip, while the man's facial expressions and hand movements shift as he continues to talk.
